hotels.description_en:
The Jerusalem Gold is an elegant hotel in the heart of the new city, next to the Central Bus Station and a 20-minute walk from the historic centre.
Rooms at the Jerusalem Gold come with extra-long beds, Mahogany furniture, black-out curtains, and double glazed windows for extra quiet. You can choose your pillow from a menu. Modern facilities include air conditioning, fridge, video games, and a laptop-sized safe.
The hotel is a stone throw away from the Jerusalem Congress Centre, while the colourful Mahne Yehuda Market is within walking distance. The city's major attractions, such as the Biblical Zoo, Time Elevator and Science Museum, are easily accessible by public transport.
There are numerous restaurants, shops and entertainment venues within short walking distance from the Gold Hotel.

Comfortable Accommodations: Biazi Hotel in Jerusalem offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes a kitchenette, work desk, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or enjoy the outdoor seating area. The hotel provides free WiFi, a lounge, and a lift for easy access.

Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for its friendly host, family-friendly environment, and convenient location.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Khan Ein Karem Boutique Hotel in Jerusalem offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and modern amenities. Each room includes a work desk, minibar, and free WiFi.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves Mediterranean, Middle Eastern, local, and international cuisines. Breakfast includes fresh pastries, fruits, and juice. Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options are available.
Leisure Activities: Guests can enjoy yoga classes, cycling, and outdoor seating areas. Additional facilities include a terrace, balcony, and patio with garden or lake views.
Prime Location: Located 49 km from Ben Gurion Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as the Holyland Model of Jerusalem (5 km) and Western Wall (10 km).
